user_intent_seed.user_goal: Customer wants to enable autopay with specific bank and date.
user_intent_seed.agent_paraphrase: Set up autopay starting next month.

user_intent_seed.user_goal: Customer wants to update multiple account fields at once.
user_intent_seed.agent_paraphrase: I need to update a few things at once.

user_intent_seed.user_goal: Customer shifts topic mid-conversation, wants two updates.
user_intent_seed.agent_paraphrase: Oh, and one more thing...

user_intent_seed.user_goal: Customer wants to apply for a personal loan.
user_intent_seed.agent_paraphrase: I want to take out a loan.

user_intent_seed.user_goal: Customer wants to report an unrecognized charge as fraud.
user_intent_seed.agent_paraphrase: There's a charge I didn't make.

user_intent_seed.user_goal: Customer wants a replacement card shipped.
user_intent_seed.agent_paraphrase: I need a new card.

user_intent_seed.user_goal: Customer follows up on an existing dispute.
user_intent_seed.agent_paraphrase: Any update on my dispute?

user_intent_seed.user_goal: Customer follows up on a pending loan application.
user_intent_seed.agent_paraphrase: How's my loan application coming?

user_intent_seed.user_goal: Customer request needs supervisor authority.
user_intent_seed.agent_paraphrase: This needs to go up the chain.

user_intent_seed.user_goal: Agent delivers information back to the customer.
user_intent_seed.agent_paraphrase: Just FYI on your account.

user_intent_seed.user_goal: Agent asks the customer to clarify an ambiguous intent.
user_intent_seed.agent_paraphrase: Quick — which option did you mean?
